name: Chicken w/ Shiitake Mushroom Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk cottage cheese, evaporated milk, and cream cheese in a blender until smooth. Set aside 1/2 cup. Refrigerate the remainder for another use.
2. In a large nonstick skillet, combine onions, sun-dried tomatoes, white wine, and garlic. Cook over medium heat for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in mushrooms, chicken broth, soy sauce, lemon juice, and thyme. Add chicken breasts. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Turn the chicken breasts and cook for an additional 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate.
5. Return the skillet to the stove and stir cornstarch mixed with water until smooth.
6. Stir in the cheese mixture. Bring to a boil, then pour over the chicken breasts.
7. Sprinkle with fresh basil. Serve immediately. Makes 4 servings.
Approximate nutritional analysis: 215 calories per serving; 34g protein; 10g carbohydrate; 2g fat (9% of calories); 2g fiber; 71mg cholesterol; 393mg sodium; 39% DV for vitamin B6, 27% for riboflavin.
